title: Battle of Yaga Minor (Yuuzhan Vong War)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Yaga Minor}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Borosk]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' |conc= |next=[[Battle of Bakura (28 ABY)|Battle of Bakura]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' |image= |name=Battle of Yaga Minor |conflict=[[Yuuzhan Vong War]] |date=[[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] |place=[[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]] |result=Nominal [[Imperial Remnant]] victory |side1=[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] |side2=Imperial Remnant |side3=[[Lumiya's Sith]] |side4= |commanders1=[[B'shith Vorrik]] |commanders2=[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kurlen Flennic]] |commanders3=[[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lady of the Sith]] [[Lumiya]] |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Grutchin]]s *[[Yorik-et|Coralskippers]] *[[Kor Chokk]]s |forces2=*[[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyers]] **[[Relentless (Dorja)|''Relentless'']] **[[Protector (Victory II-class)|''Protector'']] **[[Defiant (Imperial-class)|''Defiant'']] **''[[Peerless/Legends|Peerless]]'' *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] *Shipyard defenses |forces3= *1 [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] *Escorting forces |forces4= |casual1=*Light |casual2=*Very light |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Where are they going?''"
"''Initial vectors suggest that two-thirds of the fleet is heading out of Imperial territory.''"
"''And the remaining third?''"
"''Are heading in the opposite direction. We can't obtain a precise fix, but we think they might be heading for—''"
"''Yaga Minor.''"
"''It would appear so, sir. He probably thinks he can get away with it while our forces are committed to mopping up here.''"
"''Have ''Stalwart'' press the attack. I'd like to keep their evacuation as undignified as possible. And I want ''Relentless'' and ''Protector'' on their way to Yaga Minor immediately. ''Defiant'' and ''Peerless'', too. Flennic is going to need all the help he can get to keep those shipyards safe.|[[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] and [[Arien Yage]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''}} A minor '''skirmish''' was fought at [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. After the [[Imperial Remnant]] had badly beaten the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] fleet under [[B'shith Vorrik]] at the [[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Borosk]], Vorrik withdrew his remaining forces to [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]]. Yaga Minor was where the Imperial fleet had withdrew prior to the battle at [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]] and following the Yuuzhan Vong victory at the [[Battle of Bastion]]; it also contained the only major Imperial shipyards. Vorrik hoped to destroy the shipyards as a means of both crippling the Imperial Remnant and getting revenge for his defeat at the hands of what he thought were a crippled enemy. The local [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleet]] under Yaga Minor's [[Moff/Legends|Moff]], [[Kurlen Flennic]], held off Vorrik's forces until, at the approach of Imperial reinforcements from [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]], Vorrik decided against a second battle. He fled back towards the main Yuuzhan Vong concentration near the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]], pulling the last Yuuzhan Vong forces from the Remnant's territory. At one point, a group of Vong infiltrators entered a lab where they discovered that the Remnant was experimenting on [[Bafforr tree]] pollen. [[Lumiya's Sith]] forces arrived at the same time to retrieve the pollen. ==Behind the scenes== The Battle of Yaga Minor first appears in the novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{GamerCite|8|I, Yuuzhan Vong}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{YuuzhanVongWarNav}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Yaga Minor (28 NSY) |es=Batalla de Yaga Minor (Guerra Yuuzhan Vong) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yaga Minor (Yuuzhan Vong War), battle of}} [[Category:Battles of the Yuuzhan Vong War]] [[Category:Battles of Yaga Minor]]
